chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.942 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection Nos.06 & 22 2. For order on CMA No.1339/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.1340/2023 12.02.2026 Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the applicant Ms. Mona Mehfooz, Collector of Customs Appraisement, Karachi, West, is present. At her request, this reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned-Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
